hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
is_commit = 'git commit' in cmd and '--no-commit' not in cmd and '--abort' not in cmd
is_merge = 'git merge' in cmd and '--no-commit' not in cmd and '--abort' not in cmd
if is_commit or is_merge:
    print('A git commit was just made. Ask the user if they would like to run /review on this commit, and wait for their response before doing anything.')
"
